---
name: Correction
about: Report an error in one of the papers (typo, misstatement, mis-citation, broken link, faulty argument)
title: "[correction] <paper> § <section> <short description>"
labels: ["type:correction", "status:open"]
---

<!--
Thanks for flagging a correction. Small fixes (typos, broken links) are best
submitted as a PR directly. Substantive corrections (argument flaws,
misstated theorems, mis-citations) are best discussed here first, then
resolved via PR. See CONTRIBUTING.md § 2 for acceptance criteria.
-->

## Location

**Paper:** <!-- e.g., Paper 2 -->
**Version:** <!-- e.g., v8.2 -->
**Section:** <!-- e.g., § 6.4 -->
**Line or quoted sentence:** <!-- exact text -->

## The error

<!-- What is the error? Be specific. -->

## Why it's wrong

<!-- Supporting reasoning or citation. -->

## Proposed correction

<!-- Specific replacement text. "This is wrong" without a proposed fix is
welcome as a discussion, but a merged correction requires a proposed fix. -->

## Severity

- [ ] Typo / minor wording (cosmetic)
- [ ] Citation or link fix
- [ ] Numerical or formulaic error
- [ ] Argument or reasoning flaw
- [ ] Load-bearing claim requires substantive revision

## Submitter

<!-- Your name and a brief description of relevant background, if you'd like
the correction credited. Anonymous/pseudonymous submissions are fine for
small fixes. -->
